why: Crosses 3 of 6 high-risk classes simultaneously: new Clerk-user auth webhook branch (auth/identity), Stripe Prisma billing models imported adjacent to hardened seat-sync 9a3593d (billing/credits), and a new Prisma schema targeting a live external Supabase Postgres (schema/data migration). Manual-first evidence contract applies.
workDescription: 21st-promotion Phase 1 Backend & Schema Merge — copied 21st-dev Prisma schema (40 models) into packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma, renamed `users` model to `local_users` (21 FK relations onto it, mixed onDelete Cascade/NoAction, all values preserved unchanged), generated Prisma client to packages/db/prisma/client (gitignored), added a fresh user.created/updated/deleted branch to apps/web/app/api/webhooks/clerk/route.ts syncing local_users via the generated Prisma client only (no Stripe SDK, no 21st-dev billing/Supabase code), registered 21st-dev/apps/backend as a pnpm workspace member. Stripe billing Prisma models imported present-but-unused (zero route wiring).
